publicationStmt.p: Unpublished draft from Babken Chookaszian volume I extraction

div.head: Article 514
div.p:
ԱՆՎԱՆԱՑԱՆԿ
515
Osep 4 Osesje 299 Ovannes 352 Oxford 65, 68, 80, 487, 488 P‘ilipos 299 Pahlavi 125 Pahlavuni 351 Palladus 297 Pałtat 300 Paris 7, 65, 68, 141, 160, 164, 295, 300, 465 Parke 463 Parviz 159, 164, 165 Parwïz 300 Perse 165, 293, 294, 296, 300 Persia 65, 67, 68, 80, 82, 114, 159, 293, 295, 438,
463
